name: Code Comparison
description: Side-by-side code comparison with syntax highlighting. Shows before/after, traditional vs modern, or any two code approaches.

split.description: Equal-width side-by-side comparison, stacks on mobile

slots.left-panel: Card with header label and CodeBlock
slots.right-panel: Card with header label and CodeBlock
slots.caption: Optional bottom caption explaining the comparison

vision-split.description: High-impact split-pane with gradient backgrounds, inline syntax highlighting, absolute-positioned badges, and tech stack chips. Used for hero-level comparisons like Traditional vs AI-Native. Does NOT use CodeBlock - uses hand-crafted syntax highlighting for maximum visual control.

slots.left-panel: Gradient bg (#1a0a0a→#0d0d0d), badge top-left (red), inline syntax-highlighted code, tech chips at bottom
slots.right-panel: Gradient bg (#0a1a0a→#0d0d0d), badge top-right (green), inline syntax-highlighted code, success message at bottom
slots.caption: Bottom caption bar with highlighted keywords (structure, composition, intent)

code.imports:
import { tags } from 'decantr/tags';
import { css } from 'decantr/css';

stacked.description: Vertical stack with labels, good for longer code samples

slots.top-panel: Card with header label and CodeBlock
slots.bottom-panel: Card with header label and CodeBlock

slots.left-panel: Card with header label and CodeBlock
slots.right-panel: Card with header label and CodeBlock
